overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character leading a horse along a railroad path at night, approaching and entering a small Western frontier town. The weather begins clear but transitions to heavy rain as the character stops and turns to face the camera.

agents.ego_description: leading a horse along a dirt path beside railroad tracks, approaching distant town lights

notable_agents.action: dark horse with white markings being led by the character along the path

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks running parallel to the walking path
tall wooden telegraph or power poles lining the railroad
dark tree-covered hills rising on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path beside railroad tracks at night, leading a horse by the reins. Forested hills rise on the left while the tracks extend into the distance on the right, with the lights of a distant town visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: western town outskirts with parked wagons

events.description: transitioning from rural forest path to town outskirts with wooden buildings and covered wagons

agents.ego_description: leading the horse along the dirt road into the town, passing wooden wagons and buildings

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly alongside the character past the wagons

entered.detail: western-style wooden storefronts and houses with lit windows
parked wooden covered wagons and carts lining the right side of the road
tall street lamps casting warm light on the dirt road
wooden crates and cargo containers near the wagons

segments.scene_description: The character enters the outskirts of a Western town, walking past wooden buildings on the left and parked covered wagons on the right. Street lamps illuminate the dirt road as the railroad tracks recede into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: western town street in heavy rain

events.description: heavy rain begins falling, creating visible rain streaks and wet ground
character stops walking and turns around to face the camera

agents.ego_description: stops leading the horse and turns to face the camera while standing in the rain

notable_agents.action: horse stops beside the character and stands calmly in the heavy rain

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain begins falling as the character stops in the town street. The character turns to face the camera while the horse stands beside them, both now exposed to the downpour. The camera orbits around to show the character's face as rain streaks through the lamplight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet nighttime trek along a railroad into the rain-soaked streets of a frontier town. It begins with the character leading a horse along a dirt path beside railroad tracks, with forested hills to the left and the distant glow of town lights ahead. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into the town's outskirts, passing wooden buildings and covered wagons under the warm glow of street lamps. The environment then transforms as a heavy downpour begins, causing the character to stop in the middle of the street. Finally, the camera orbits around the character and horse to reveal their faces as rain streaks through the lamplight.
